messages.content: 英文翻译成中文    A liquid organic HSM can plausibly be distributed via the existing gasoline infrastructure with minimal modification, saving vast capital costs. Ideally the HSM would be minimally volatile, minimally toxic, and biodegradable.
一种液态有机HSM可以通过现有的汽油基础设施进行分销，只需进行最小限度的修改，节省大量资本成本。理想情况下，HSM应该是最小挥发，最小有毒，并且可生物降解的。

英文翻译成中文  One advantage of the heterocyclic liquid strategy is that the liquid can in principle be repurified when necessary, so that the inevitable non-regenerable fraction of the HSM does not build up on the vehicle—a weight and capacity penalty.
杂环液体策略的一个优点是，在必要时液体可以原则上重新净化，因此HSM不可再生的不可避免的部分不会在车辆上积累，这会增加负荷和容量。

英文翻译成中文   Efficiency of HSM regeneration will be a key point because any shortfall would raise purification costs and require HSM to be made up with newly manufactured material with a consequent economic penalty.
HSM再生效率将是一个关键点，因为任何不足都会提高净化成本并要求使用新制造的材料来补充HSM，这会带来经济上的惩罚。

英文翻译成中文     Catalysts that can meet the severe selectivity and activity requirements must be further developed. Since it is not yet clear which HSM to choose, the HSM and the catalyst will have to be optimized together.
必须进一步开发能够满足高度选择性和活性要求的催化剂。由于尚不清楚选择哪种HSM，因此需要同时针对HSM和催化剂进行优化。
英文翻译成中文  To meet the more aggressive DOE goals, more than one H would need to be stored per heavy atom, for example C(CH2NH2)4–C(CN)4 has an 11.7% capacity.
为了实现更具有挑战性的DOE目标，需要在每个重原子上存储超过一个氢原子，例如C(CH2NH2)4–C(CN)4的容量为11.7%。

英文翻译成中文   The volumetric capacity for typical heterocycles is also satisfactory, although in energy terms not as good as gasoline, because only some of the hydrogen atoms of the HSM end up as H2O and all the carbon remains uncombusted. The situation for gasoline, denoted (CH2)n, undergoing complete combustion versus the same (CH2)n, but now acting as an HSM with the hydrogen released ultimately undergoing oxidation with air, can be represented as follows.
对于典型杂环而言，其体积容量也是令人满意的，尽管在能量方面不如汽油好，因为HSM中只有部分氢原子最终成为水，而所有的碳都没有燃烧。对于汽油（表示为(CH2)n）完全燃烧与同样是(CH2)n，但现在作为HSM，其氢被释放，最终与空气氧化的情况，可以表示如下。
英文翻译成中文   In general terms, the exothermicity of a combustion reaction of H2 or of a hydrocarbon is simply proportional to the amount of O2 consumed.
一般而言，氢气或碳氢化合物的燃烧反应的放热量与消耗的氧气量成正比。

英文翻译成中文   Comparison of the O2 used in the two equations above suggests that the energy content of an organic HSM is ca. 17% of the value that the same material would have if completely combusted as a normal fuel.
上述两个方程式中使用的氧气的比较表明，有机HSM的能量含量约为同一材料作为普通燃料完全燃烧时的价值的17%。

英文翻译成中文     Design of the HSM requires attention to numerous points including (i) toxicity; (ii) thermal stability against undesired decomposition pathways; (iii) safety in accidental release such as in automobile collisions; (iv) biodegradability; (v) thermodynamic tendency to liberate H2; (vi) kinetic facility for reversible H2 release; (vii) cheap manufacture on a 1011 kg scale. Points (i)– (vii) severely restrict the types of materials that can be used, not only for the liquid organic strategy but for all others as well.
设计HSM需要注意许多点，包括(i)毒性；(ii)热稳定性，防止出现不良分解途径；(iii)在意外释放（如汽车碰撞）时的安全性；(iv)可生物降解性；(v)释放H2的热力学倾向；(vi)可逆H2释放的动力学能力；(vii)在1011 kg规模下便宜的制造成本。 (i)-(vii)限制了可用于液体有机策略以及所有其他策略的材料类型。
英文翻译成中文    Thermal decomposition is a serious issue and work will be needed to understand the thermolysis pathways of candidate HSMs and find ways to guard against them by suitable design.
热分解是一个严重的问题，需要进行研究，以了解候选HSM的热解途径，并通过合适的设计找到防范措施。

英文翻译成中文  Liquid organic HSMs can be of low volatility and have a high flash point, minimizing accidental release problems, and they may be biodegradable, particularly in their hydrogenated form, thanks to their heteroatom content. Quantitative structureactivity relationships (QSAR), now being developed both for toxicity and for biodegradation of N-heterocycles.
液态有机HSM可以具有低挥发度和高闪点，最小化意外释放问题，并且它们可能是可生物降解的，特别是在氢化形式下，这要归功于它们的杂原子含量。现在正在为N-杂环的毒性和生物降解性开发定量构效关系(QSAR)研究。

英文翻译成中文    ‘Virtual H2 storage’ could avoid this step by using
the electrical power source not to produce free H2 but to directly
reduce the HSM electrocatalytically,
“虚拟H2储存”可以通过使用电力源直接电催化还原HSM来避免这一步骤，而不是产生游离H2。
英文翻译成中文   Likewise, a direct fuel cell could allow the conversion of the fresh HSM to motive power without H2 production。
同样，直接燃料电池可以使新鲜的HSM转化为动力而无需产生H2。

英文翻译成中文   The liquid heterocycle strategy is worth greater emphasis because it has a number of advantages of simplicity, safety, scalability, heat management, and economy. Catalyst development is needed for further progress, however, since catalytic heterocycle dehydrogenation is a neglected topic.
液态杂环策略值得更大的重视，因为它具有许多简单、安全、可扩展、热管理和经济的优点。然而，为了进一步发展，需要进行催化剂开发，因为杂环的催化脱氢是一个被忽视的主题。

英文翻译成中文   I thank Eric Clot and Odile Eisenstein for their many insightful contributions to this and other problems of mutual interest, Peter Hall (Strathclyde) for the direct fuel cell idea, the referees for useful suggestions and DOE and NSF for funding our catalysis work.
我感谢Eric Clot和Odile Eisenstein对这个和其他彼此感兴趣的问题所做的许多有见地的贡献，Peter Hall（斯特拉斯克莱德）提出了直接燃料电池的想法，评审人员提供了有用的建议，DOE和NSF资助了我们的催化工作。

英文翻译成中文  Educated at Oxford and Sussex Universities and CNRS Natural Products Institute in Paris. Now, a Professor of Chemistry at Yale, he works extensively on catalysis, both organometallic and bioinorganic. Appointed Dow lecturer at Berkeley, Sabatier Lecturer at Toulouse, and will be Osborn Lecturer at Strasbourg and Mond Lecturer in the UK. He has been awarded ACS and RSC prizes for organometallic chemistry.
曾在牛津大学和苏塞克斯大学以及巴黎CNRS自然产品研究所接受教育。现任耶鲁大学化学教授，广泛从事催化研究，包括有机金属催化和生物无机催化。被任命为伯克利的道化学讲师，图卢兹的萨巴蒂埃讲师，并将成为斯特拉斯堡的奥斯本讲师和英国的蒙德讲师。他曾获得ACS和RSC的有机金属化学奖。
